# Page 2^page=2
HARTING Technology Group | Dr. Sebastian Eicke | DPP @ HARTING Definition(1) „Digital Product Passport“ means a set of data specific to a product … that is accessible via electronic means through a data carrier … Definition(1) „Digital Product Passport“ means a set of data specific to a product … that is accessible via electronic means through a data carrier … (1) REGULATION (EU) 2024/1781 OF THE EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL Definition(1) … means a linear bar code symbol, a two- dimensional symbol or other automatic identification data capture medium that can be read by a device Definition(1) … means a linear bar code symbol, a two- dimensional symbol or other automatic identification data capture medium that can be read by a device EU Digital Product Passport DPP
